form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently won by 3.5 len at this track March 14 over 1200m in soft going defeating Girl Code carrying 57.5kg at $5.60. Before that 4th of 7 at Otaki on February 21 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Sierra Leone with 58kg at $9.90. Looks hard to beat again.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 43-day let-up. At the latest run came from midfield and won by 0.6 len at this track February 22 over 1360m on a rain affected track defeating Riomosa with 55.5kg at $5.20. The start before that 3rd in a small field at Waipukurau on February 15 over 1400m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Sperlari with 55.5kg at $5.70. More weight here and worth including at odds.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 13 months raced behind the speed prior to fading 9th of 11 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1600m, slow going 5.5 len behind Victorious Warrior carrying 59kg at $27.60. Previously second-up ran on strongly from last on the turn and won by 0.5 len at New Plymouth Raceway November 22 2024 over 2000m in soft going defeating Please Sir carrying 58.5kg at $4.40. Expecting him to kick on with that first run out of the way.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign eighth of 13 at Trentham January 3 over 1600m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Bradley carrying 58kg at $17.20. On debut won by 0.8 len Awapuni Synthetic July 4 over 1200m defeating Merchant Banker with 56kg at $2.50. Everything points to a positive return.
